profile: Frontend developer with hl{nearly 3 years} of production experience — built a real-time B2B parking management platform and a transaction system used by hl{external partner banks}. Completed an MSc in Computer Science at the University of Lincoln (hl{Distinction}). Works across the full React ecosystem; experienced in complex state management, hardware API integration, and diagnosing cross-browser and performance issues in live environments.

responsibilities: Built the operator dashboard for a B2B parking management platform serving hl{6 sites} — structured as an independent hl{micro-frontend} module to decouple deployments and enable the team to release without cross-team coordination.
Integrated the frontend with hl{hardware APIs} for automated entry and exit machines — handling real-time polling and async state to keep the operator UI synchronised with physical machine events.
Added hl{Jest and Vitest} coverage to previously untested core modules — establishing a regression baseline that caught hardware API edge cases before deployment.
Built cross-platform mobile views using hl{React Native} for on-site operators, and implemented multi-language support via React-i18next.

projects.name: VETC Smart Parking
projects.description: B2B parking management platform serving multiple partner sites
responsibilities: Web dashboard for B2B partners (apartment complexes, commercial sites) to monitor parking space availability, manage automated entry/exit machines, and review transaction history across sites.
Companion mobile app for on-site operators with real-time gate status and transaction management from the parking floor.
Multi-language support serving operator teams across different partner locations.

Built and maintained the transaction dashboards, data entry workflows, and real-time financial views on a hl{production banking platform} used by hl{external partner banks} — owning the operator-facing frontend from initial build through to live support.
Designed and built the React component library hl{from scratch} using Atomic Design — establishing the shared UI foundation used across all product areas of the banking platform.

Led cross-browser compatibility and performance debugging across the platform — diagnosing and resolving rendering inconsistencies and regressions that affected reliability for operator workflows handling live financial data.

Integrated the frontend with hl{RESTful APIs} end-to-end — defining interface contracts with backend teams and building error-handling flows to ensure consistent, reliable data delivery across all financial views.

projects.name: KienLong Bank CMS
projects.description: Internal transaction management platform for KienLong Bank operators
responsibilities: Operator-facing platform for KienLong Bank staff to view, monitor, and manage client transactions in real time.
Live system monitoring with frontend error detection and an incident response workflow to maintain uninterrupted bank operations.
Companion employee management portal supporting internal staff administration alongside the core transaction CMS.

personal_projects.name: L.I.V.E
personal_projects.subtitle: Learn. Improve. Visualise. Empower
personal_projects.description: Full-stack web application for gamified diabetes education — MSc Computer Science project, University of Lincoln. Sole owner from design to production deployment.
responsibilities: Took hl{full ownership from design to production}: architected the system using hl{Atomic Design}, built the frontend (React/Vite/Tailwind/shadcn) and backend (FastAPI/PostgreSQL), and deployed to Microsoft Azure.
Built to hl{WCAG 2.1 AA} accessibility standards throughout — ensuring full compliance for keyboard navigation, screen reader support, and colour contrast.
Automated the build and deployment pipeline using hl{Docker and Azure CI/CD}, enabling reliable, repeatable deployments from day one.
Implemented hl{JWT-based authentication} with role-based access control and a guest user flow — allowing unauthenticated users to explore core features without registration.
